tavily_api_key.pricing: Free tier available, paid plans start at $25/month
tavily_api_key.notes: 专为AI优化的搜索引擎API，适合科技新闻和AI内容

bing_api_key.platform: Microsoft Azure Cognitive Services - Bing Search
bing_api_key.pricing: Free tier: 1000 transactions/month, then $7 per 1000 transactions
bing_api_key.notes: 支持site:语法，可限制搜索结果到特定域名

serpapi_api_key.pricing: Free tier: 100 searches/month, paid plans start at $50/month
serpapi_api_key.notes: 备用方案，支持多种搜索引擎包括Bing

firecrawl_api_key.notes: 用于抓取JavaScript渲染的动态页面

jina_reader.usage: 免费公共端点，直接将URL拼接到 https://r.jina.ai/ 后
jina_reader.rate_limit: 可能有请求限制，适合小规模使用

rsshub.notes: 支持微信公众号、知乎、微博等平台的RSS转换

quick_start_example.python_code:
from Omni_Intelligence_Radar import OmniIntelligenceRadar

config = {
    "tavily_api_key": "your_key_here",
    "bing_api_key": "your_key_here",
    "firecrawl_api_key": "your_key_here"
}

radar = OmniIntelligenceRadar(config)

# 搜索火山引擎相关信息
result = radar.gather_vendor_intelligence("OpenClaw", "volcengine")
print(f"找到 {result['summary']['total_urls_found']} 个URL")
print(f"成功提取 {result['summary']['successfully_extracted']} 个文档")
